FROM client
JOIN disp ON disp.client_link
JOIN account ON disp.account_link
JOIN loan ON loan.account_link
JOIN trans ON trans.account_link
WHERE loan.loan_id = (
    SELECT loan.loan_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY loan.total_amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AND trans.trans_date = (
    SELECT MIN(trans.trans_date)
    FROM trans
    WHERE trans.account_link = account.account_id
)

SELECT 
    ((IFNULL(trans_end.avg_balance, 0) - IFNULL(trans_start.avg_balance, 0)) / NULLIF(trans_start.avg_balance, 0)) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan
JOIN 
    account ON loan.account_link
JOIN 
    disp ON account.disp_link
JOIN 
    client ON disp.client_link
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         account.account_id, 
         AVG(trans.avg_balance) AS avg_balance
     FROM 
         trans
     JOIN 
         account ON trans.account_link
     WHERE 
         trans.trans_date = '1993-03-22'
     GROUP BY 
         account.account_id) AS trans_start ON account.account_id = trans_start.account_id
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         account.account_id, 
         AVG(trans.avg_balance) AS avg_balance
     FROM 
         trans
     JOIN 
         account ON trans.account_link
     WHERE 
         trans.trans_date = '1998-12-27'
     GROUP BY 
         account.account_id) AS trans_end ON account.account_id = trans_end.account_id
WHERE 
    loan.loan_date = '1993-07-05' 
LIMIT 1
